generates.label: Generates
generates.desc: This card or relic produces the target resource or mechanic.

amplifies.label: Amplifies
amplifies.desc: This card or relic increases the power or value of the target.

triggers.label: Triggers
triggers.desc: This card or relic activates or conditions the target mechanic.

scales_with.label: Scales with
scales_with.desc: This card or relic becomes more powerful as the target resource grows.

conflict.label: Conflicts with
conflict.desc: This card or relic works against or undermines the target.
